fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 73 uses strict greater-than (`now > deadline`) instead of greater-than-or-equal (`now >= deadline`), so when `now == deadline` the entry is incorrectly treated as still valid and returned instead of the default.

constraints.intent: When now equals deadline the condition should be true so the entry is treated as expired; the strict > misses the equality case.
Sanity check that deadline__1 is available and the comparison covers both sides including equality.
In the else branch (entry not expired), now must be strictly less than deadline; if now == deadline we should not reach here.
Confirm deadline__1 was properly extracted from the validated record before the expiry comparison.
